usp: Quick response and reasonably priced service
Upfront pricing with a free quote before work begins
BBB Accredited with an A+ Rating and HomeStars Verified

services.name: Electrical Service & Repairs
services.description: All-encompassing range of electrical services and repairs for homeowners, including fixing faulty circuits, replacing outlets, and adding interconnected smoke detectors.

services.name: Aluminum Wiring Inspection & Repairs
services.description: Inspection, evaluation, repair, replacement, and certificate of inspection services for homes with aluminum branch wiring.

services.name: Electrical Troubleshooting And Repairs
services.description: Diagnosis and repair of faulty electrical circuits and components, including breakers tripping, faulty outlets, inoperable lighting, and overloaded circuits.

services.name: Electrical Renovations
services.description: Electrical upgrades for home renovations, including new wiring, lighting, pot lights, added outlets, relocated switches, and appliance circuits.

services.name: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.description: Electrical panel upgrade services for residential homes.

services.name: Smoke Detectors Installation
services.description: Smoke and CO detector installation services.

services.name: Electrical Car Charging Station
services.description: Residential EV charging station installation with evaluation for cost-effective placement and installation.

services.name: Electrical Inspections
services.description: Electrical inspection services for residential properties.

services.name: Smart Home Automation Systems Calgary AB
services.description: Lutron smart home automation solutions, from single-room setups to whole-house systems, including Caseta Wireless and RadioRA solutions.

how_it_works.description: Call Westpro Electrical Services and speak directly to a qualified electrician about your electrical issue or project
Westpro evaluates the issue, explains the problem, lays out the solution, and provides a fair estimate or free quote
Schedule the work at a time that fits your schedule
Westpro completes the work with professional service, tidy workmanship, and a focus on customer satisfaction

faq.question: What areas do you serve?
faq.answer: Calgary, Northwest Calgary, Northeast Calgary, Southwest Calgary, Southeast Calgary, and Cochrane.

faq.question: Do you provide free quotes?
faq.answer: Yes. You will receive a free quote before work begins, with no obligation.

faq.question: Do you charge overtime or hidden fees?
faq.answer: No. Westpro states that it offers upfront pricing with no overtime charge or hidden fees.

faq.question: Do you offer financing?
faq.answer: Yes. Westpro partners with Financeit.ca to offer flexible payment options.

faq.question: What kind of electrical work do you specialize in?
faq.answer: Residential electrical services, including repairs, troubleshooting, renovations, inspections, panel upgrades, lighting, EV charging stations, hot tubs, smoke detectors, surge protection, aluminum wiring work, and smart home automation.
